name: AI Structured Output (Tool Calls)
description: Use OpenAI function calling / structured outputs with Zod schemas to guarantee typed JSON responses from any model. Includes schema definition, validation, error retry, and streaming with partial object support.

steps.description: Install Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI provider, and Zod
Define Zod schemas for your AI outputs (e.g., ProductSchema, SummarySchema)
Create extract<T>(prompt, schema) using generateObject() — returns validated TypeScript type
Create streamExtract<T>(prompt, schema) using streamObject() for progressive UI updates
Create extraction API route with input validation and error handling
Add tests with mocked AI responses verifying schema validation
